payload.text:
Create a lesson plan generator for foreign teachers in Thailand. Apply the following format:
Lesson/Topic, strand/standards based on Ministry of Education in Thailand, objective of the lesson, summary, Vocabulary, grammar, Worksheet, procedure (warm up, presentation, Practice, Product, wrap up), Materials, and Evaluation

**Crafting the Framework**

I'm currently building the foundational structure for this lesson plan generator.  The key modules are solidifying: Lesson/Topic, MOE-aligned Standards, clear Objectives, concise Summary, and essential Vocabulary. This initial framework will ensure a user-friendly and effective tool for teachers in Thailand.


**Expanding the Blueprint**

I've been fleshing out the lesson plan's core components further, focusing on grammar points, worksheet design, and the established PPP procedure.  Materials and evaluation strategies are also under consideration.  For the UI, I'm aiming for a professional, Thai-inspired design using React 18+, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Gemini API will be used for content generation. I'm exploring file structure and form fields, aiming for user-friendly input.


**Refining Curriculum Integration**

I'm now fully integrating the Thai Basic Education Core Curriculum (BECC) into the system. I'm focusing on parsing the BECC data, specifically the format which will be JSON, to allow for seamless rendering within the React app, which is a key requirement.  Additionally, I am incorporating specific elements like the MOE's strands and their related standards (e.g., F1.1 Gr.3). My focus remains on a user-friendly and standards-aligned tool for Thai educators.


**Adding Key Annotations**

I'm working to enhance the generated lesson plans by integrating specific notations for clearer alignment with Thai educational standards. I'll prompt the AI to include relevant references to MOE strands and their associated grade-level benchmarks, ensuring complete curriculum integration for Thai teachers.

entries.description: Project metadata including name, description and permissions.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font configuration.
React entry point using React 18 createRoot.
Shared TypeScript interfaces and enums for the application.
Gemini API service for generating Thai-specific lesson plans.
Common layout wrapper with navigation and footer.
